text: Match the word "RESTRICTED IN HER ABILITY TO MANEUVER" with the most suitable word given below

options.text: One prolonged blast followed by two short
One prolonged blast every two minutes

explanation: According to Rule 3(ii) of COLREGs, a vessel 'restricted in her ability to maneuver' is one that cannot take actions to avoid another ship due to her work. The defined sound signal for such a vessel when underway is one prolonged blast followed by two short blasts.
